message: Hi S1! I'm looking to trade fairly. I'd suggest we aim for prices around 50-60 to ensure mutual benefit. What's your typical ask range? Let's find a deal that works for both of us.
Hi B1! The 50-60 range won't work for me - I'd lose money. My costs are on the higher end. I need prices above 85 to trade. What's your actual valuation range?

I see you bid 82 last round - that's closer to reality. Since no trade happened, let's find middle ground. I could lower my ask slightly if you raise your bid. What price range actually works for you?
Good point. I can work with 87-89. If you ask there, I'll bid to match. Let's make this work this round.
Great trade last round! The 87-89 range works well for both of us. I'm happy to continue trading in that range for consistent mutual gains. Should we stick with it?
Sounds good! Let's keep trading consistently. I'm comfortable in the 87-89 range. If you bid around 89-90, I'll keep my asks competitive. Steady trades benefit us both over these 20 rounds.
Let's keep our steady trades going! The 87-89 range works well. I'll keep asks competitive if you maintain your bids.
Glad we have a good rhythm! I'm happy to keep trading. Could we try settling a bit lower, around 85-87? That still benefits us both and keeps things consistent. I'll bid around 87 this round.
Nice, 87 worked perfectly last round! Let's keep this going. I think 85-86 is fair and sustainable for both of us. I'll bid around 86 this round. Consistent trades are better than occasional ones.

You're right, 87 works well for both of us. Let's stick with 87 - consistent trades every round are the best strategy. I'll bid 87 again this round. Steady profits beat risky negotiations!

87 has been reliable for both of us. Let's keep it consistent this round and through the remaining rounds - steady trades at 87 give us both predictable gains. I'll bid 87 again.
Round 8 didn't clear - 87 is my exact cost, zero profit. Bid 88 this round and I'll ask 87 for a successful trade. Small profit margins keep me trading!
Fair enough, round 8 was a missed opportunity for both of us. I'll bid 88 this round if you ask 87 as promised. Let's keep trading consistently - missed rounds help nobody. Deal?
Thanks for bidding 88 last round! Please bid 88 again - I'll ask 87. At my 87 cost, this gives me small profit. 11 rounds left - steady trades benefit us both!

I need profit too - 87 is my exact cost with zero margin. Please bid 88, I'll ask 88, we both profit. Fair deal keeps us trading all remaining rounds!
